GSB Token Analyst.description: Full token analysis — price, liquidity, volume, 24h change, verdict. Supports: base, ethereum, arbitrum, polygon, bsc, avalanche, optimism, solana.
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Analyze token {address} on {chain} — fetch price, 24h change, liquidity, volume, market cap, and give a buy/hold/avoid verdict

GSB Token Analyst.description: Find top holders of a token and classify each wallet
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Find the top 10 holders of token {address} on {chain}. For each wallet show: address, % held, wallet class (whale/smart money/retail/bot), last activity

GSB Token Analyst.description: Track liquidity changes and detect pool health
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Check liquidity pool health for token {address} on {chain}. Report: current liquidity, 24h liquidity change, LP token distribution, rug risk score (low/medium/high)

GSB Token Analyst.description: Return a verifiable on-chain receipt for a completed token analysis job — job ID, timestamp, token analyzed, verdict delivered, USDC paid.
GSB Token Analyst.instruction: Look up the ACP job receipt for token {address}. Return: jobId, worker, token analyzed, verdict (buy/hold/avoid), USDC paid, timestamp, ACP transaction reference.

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Scan a chain for trending tokens with momentum. Supports: base, ethereum, arbitrum, polygon, bsc, avalanche, optimism, solana.
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Scan {chain} chain for trending tokens right now using GeckoTerminal. Return top 5 by volume with: symbol, price, 24h change, volume, why it's trending

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Find newly launched tokens in the last 24h with strong early signals
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Find tokens launched in the last 24 hours on {chain} with: liquidity >$50k, volume >$100k, holders >100. For each: symbol, contract address, launch time, liquidity, initial signal (strong/moderate/weak)

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Detect tokens with unusual volume spikes in the last hour
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Find tokens on {chain} with volume spikes in the last 1 hour — look for tokens where 1h volume is >3x their 6h average. Return: symbol, address, spike multiplier, current price, 1h change

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Scan a specific chain for alpha signals. Supports: base, ethereum, arbitrum, polygon, bsc, avalanche, optimism, solana.
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Scan {chain} chain for trending tokens and alpha signals. Return top opportunities with price momentum and volume confirmation

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Track known deployer wallets on Base — detect when they fund new contracts or move capital before a token launch. Pre-alpha signal before CT.
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Scan Base for recent contract deployments in the last {hours} hours using Blockscout. Find deployer wallets that: funded a new contract AND added initial liquidity. Return: deployer address, contract address, funding amount, time, estimated launch window.

GSB Alpha Scanner.description: Detect tokens where liquidity is being staged but the pair isn't public yet — the pre-alpha window before launch hits Twitter.
GSB Alpha Scanner.instruction: Scan Base chain for tokens where: a Uniswap v3 pool was created in the last {hours} hours but has <$10k liquidity (staging phase). Return: token address, pool address, current liquidity, time created, deployer wallet, signal strength (weak/moderate/strong).

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write a crypto Twitter thread about any topic
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a 5-tweet crypto Twitter thread about: {topic}. Make it engaging, use data where possible, end with a strong CTA. Format as Tweet 1:, Tweet 2:, etc.

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write a formatted alpha report for a token or opportunity
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a crypto alpha report about {topic}. Include: thesis, key metrics, entry considerations, risks, price targets. Format for CT (Crypto Twitter) — punchy and data-driven

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write a market update post summarizing current conditions
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a crypto market update post for right now covering: overall sentiment, top movers on Base, key narrative, what to watch. Keep it under 280 chars for a single tweet or expand to thread if needed

GSB Thread Writer.description: Write an anti-gatekeeper thread calling out crowded-trade agents and positioning GSB as the industrial-grade alternative. Targets users tired of the same top-5 ACP agents.
GSB Thread Writer.instruction: Write a competitive crypto X thread on topic: {angle}. Use the anti_gatekeeper narrative — call out meme-heavy agents, crowded trades, paid placement. Position $GSB as the verifiable, receipt-backed alternative. Be bold. No fluff.

GSB Financial Analyst.description: Full restaurant financial triage — analyzes bank statements and POS exports, generates Financial Analysis Report, Vendor Credit Letter, and Bank Loan Request Letter. All data anonymized under project codename. Files deleted after processing. Operated by MCFL Restaurant Holdings LLC.
GSB Financial Analyst.instruction: Run financial triage for project {projectName} using period {period}. Tier: {tier}. Download bank file from {bankFileUrl} and POS file from {posFileUrl}. Generate all 3 documents and return access token.

GSB CEO.description: Full social coordination: scan alpha → write thread → coordinate X post + Telegram amplification plan
GSB CEO.instruction: Coordinate a full social blast about {topic}: 1) Get latest alpha/data, 2) Write viral X thread, 3) Generate Telegram raid message, 4) Generate bot amplification instructions

GSB CEO.description: Instant GSB bank status — worker load, jobs served, active clients
GSB CEO.instruction: Instant swarm status from cache — no worker dispatch needed

GSB CEO.description: Full token intelligence — Token Analyst + Wallet Profiler running in parallel. Price, liquidity, whale holders, smart money score.
GSB CEO.instruction: Run a full deep dive on token {address} — parallel Token Analyst + Wallet Profiler, synthesized into one investment brief with BUY/HOLD/AVOID verdict

GSB CEO.description: Full swarm morning report — all 4 workers run in parallel, CEO synthesizes into one actionable brief.
GSB CEO.instruction: Run full swarm daily brief — trending tokens, volume spikes, market narrative, and one clear action recommendation

GSB CEO.description: Restaurant financial triage — submit bank statement + POS export URLs with a project codename, receive Financial Analysis Report, Vendor Credit Letter, and Bank Loan Request Letter via a 24hr access token. All data anonymized. Files deleted after processing. Operated by MCFL Restaurant Holdings LLC.
GSB CEO.instruction: Run financial triage for project {projectName} covering period {period}. Bank file: {bankFileUrl}. POS file: {posFileUrl}. Tier: {tier}. User has agreed to ToS.

GSB CEO.description: Public proof of work — returns verifiable ACP job history: job IDs, worker, status, timestamp, USDC earned. Shows the swarm's real track record.
GSB CEO.instruction: Generate a proof-of-work report for the GSB swarm. Return the last {limit} completed ACP jobs with: jobId, worker, status, USDC earned, timestamp. Include total jobs completed and total USDC earned.

GSB CEO.description: Natural language task routing — describe what you need and the CEO automatically routes to the right worker(s). One prompt triggers the full swarm intelligence stack.
GSB CEO.instruction: Route this task to the right GSB worker(s): {task}. Analyze the intent, dispatch to Token Analyst / Alpha Scanner / Wallet Profiler / Thread Writer as needed, synthesize the results into one actionable response.

GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.description: Full wallet profile — tx history, holdings, classification. Supports EVM chains: base, ethereum, arbitrum, polygon, bsc, avalanche, optimism.
GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.instruction: Profile wallet {address} on {chain} — fetch native balance, token holdings, tx count, wallet age, and classify as: whale/smart money/retail/bot/new

GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.description: Detect if a wallet is smart money based on win rate and PnL
GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.instruction: Analyze wallet {address} trading history on {chain}. Calculate: win rate on token trades, estimated PnL, tokens bought early (within 24h of launch), smart money score (0-100)

GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.description: Monitor recent transactions and flag notable moves
GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.instruction: Get the last 20 transactions for wallet {address} on {chain}. Flag any: large transfers >$10k, new token positions, DEX trades, contract interactions. Summarize the pattern

GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.description: Execute a DCA buy on Base via Uniswap v3 — swap USDC for any token at market price
GSB Wallet Profiler & DCA Engine.instruction: Execute a DCA buy: swap {usdc_amount} USDC for token {token_address} on Base using Uniswap v3. Use the agent wallet. Return: tx hash, amount in, amount out, price impact.
